title: Faulad No.1
desc: Our story revolves around Jackie who worshipped the body of his beloved like a temple and in order to gain access into this abode of heaven, he bargained his future by marrying a rich spoilt damsel, to gain access to her ill-gotten wealth and shower them at the feet of his beloved, but his rich wife Mona soon found out and decided to teach him a lesson

title: Raja Ki Aayegi Baaraat
desc: Raja rapes Mala and the court orders him to marry her. His family continues to torture Mala and attempts to kill her, but she manages to win over Raja and his family with her good deeds.

title: Sarkar
desc: Sarkar, an influential man, is falsely charged with the murder of an upright politician. When he is imprisoned, his son Shankar steps into his shoes as a leader to protect his father and their legacy.

title: Kisaan
desc: The story of a farmer, Maan Singh, who struggles to save his ancestral land from corrupt officials and greedy businessmen. With the help of his son, he fights against the system and stands up for his rights as a farmer. The movie highlights the challenges faced by farmers in modern India and explores themes of family, tradition, and social justice in a poignant and inspiring plot.
